who: HR managers in small to medium-sized accounting firms processing 5–15 payrolls/month
offer: For HR managers in small to medium-sized accounting firms processing 5–15 payrolls/month, discrepancies cause employee dissatisfaction and compliance issues. We provide alerts for discrepancies instead of manual reconciliation processes.
problem: Discrepancies in payroll processing leading to potential employee dissatisfaction and compliance issues.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for HR managers seeking solutions
Indie Hackers discussions on payroll management challenges

pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path

Produce a short demo video of manual workflows
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
